change.final_action: Rejected and code/test changes reverted after final 128K promotion check did not improve long-context prefill and 512 decode was not clearly non-regressive versus retained baseline.
change.summary: Candidate changed only resident Q8_0 T16 WMMA prefill 768-row in<=2048,out>=8192 projections from TM32/TN32 to TM64/TN32; row512 and row1024 out8192 policies stayed unchanged.

checks.name: primary gate
checks.result: Stable IDs 220/570 and flat memory; candidate primary min decode 115.368844 tok/s.

checks.name: 128K promotion check
checks.result: Stable ID 220 and flat 23.310 GiB memory, but 128K prefill measured 739.645891 tok/s versus the retained decode-policy-cache 745.977 tok/s and Q8T16 small-shape 747.033 tok/s references.

checks.name: prompt verifier
checks.result: The targeted 768-row low-memory tile did not improve 128K prefill, and 512/128 decode was not clearly non-regressive versus the retained decode-policy-cache baseline (127.263 -> 126.941 tok/s).

commands.final_128k: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt PYTHONPATH=. /home/lhl/mambaforge/envs/therock/bin/python3.12 scripts/qwen35_readme_sweep.py --engine gguf --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_S.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_s --workloads 128K/128 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-gguf-tuning-gpu1-final-128k.json
commands.guard: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_t16_repack.py tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_t16_selected_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_q6_k_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_gemv_decode_dispatch.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_compact_moe_gemv_routing.py -q
commands.primary: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt PYTHONPATH=. /home/lhl/mambaforge/envs/therock/bin/python3.12 scripts/qwen35_readme_sweep.py --engine gguf --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_S.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_s --workloads 512/128 4K/128 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-gguf-tuning-gpu1-acceptance.json

hardware: GPU1 AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 (24GB class)
notes: Primary gate changes may partly be run noise because 512/4K use 512/1024-row chunks, while the candidate only isolates the 768-row out8192 policy.
The final 128K check was run because the candidate targeted low-memory 768-row chunks.
